items.snippet: PennantPark FY2020: Q4 NII $0.20/share, NAV $7.84/share; portfolio $1.08B; declares $0.12/share distribution.

items.headline_ai: PennantPark schedules Q4 FY2020 earnings release for November 19
items.snippet: PennantPark will report fourth fiscal quarter 2020 results on November 19, 2020 after market close.

items.snippet: PennantPark declares its fourth fiscal quarter 2020 distribution of $0.12/share, payable October 6, 2020.

items.headline_ai: PennantPark forms joint venture with Pantheon to launch middle market senior loan fund
items.snippet: PennantPark and Pantheon private credit unit form PennantPark Senior Loan Fund I to target middle-market financing opportunities.

items.headline_ai: PennantPark posts Q2 FY2020 NII of $0.17/share, cuts quarterly distribution, waives incentive fee
items.snippet: PennantPark Q2 FY2020: NII $0.17/share, NAV $7.71/share; cuts distribution and waives incentive fee amid COVID-19.

items.headline_ai: PennantPark issues open letter to stakeholders on COVID-19 impact
items.snippet: PennantPark issues letter to shareholders outlining portfolio resilience and strategy amid the COVID-19 pandemic.

items.headline_ai: PennantPark insiders buy 208,000 shares in February-March 2020
items.snippet: PennantPark management and directors purchase 208,136 shares from February 12 to March 31, 2020, signaling confidence.
